hero.title: AI Design Engineer
hero.subtitle: & Product Designer
hero.description: I design experiences, validate with users, and deliver in code.
hero.experience: 5 years of experience in Fintech · HealthTech · SaaS

featured.title: Featured case
featured.headline: From financial control to transformation platform
featured.description: Yampa is a financial management platform for Brazilian SMBs. I led the complete redesign — from navigation architecture to production code — transforming a traditional ERP into an AI-driven platform.
featured.description2: I created two AI agents with distinct personalities (Yago and Yana) and implemented a financial diagnostic system (ISF 2.0) that contextualizes business health for each user.

results.title: Results
results.frontend: Reduction in front-end delivery time (5 days → 1-2 days)

phases.phase1Desc: Continuous Discovery: automatic collection of in-app comments and feedback, AI-powered theme categorization, and recurrence-based prioritization
phases.phase2Desc: JTBD, Jobs Stories, RICE/MoSCoW — PRD with acceptance criteria
phases.phase3Desc: Navigation architecture by "Areas of Action" — mental journey
phases.phase5Desc: Direct delivery in TypeScript, React and Tailwind
phases.phase6Desc: Metrics monitoring and next Discovery cycle

cta.title: Let's create something amazing?
cta.description: Open to freelance projects, full-time opportunities, and interesting collaborations in Fintech, HealthTech and SaaS.

about.speaker: Speaker TDC Recife 2023 — Accessibility, UX and Ethics
about.name: Silas Vasques
about.bio: I'm a Product Designer with 8+ years of experience, working in digital product design — I design, validate, and deliver in code.
about.bio2: I work at the intersection of design and engineering: I design experiences, validate with users, and deliver in code — eliminating handoff bottlenecks and accelerating time-to-market.
about.bio3: At Yampa, I reduced front-end delivery time by 75% by implementing interfaces directly in TypeScript, React and Tailwind, with AI agent orchestration.
